description: Perfect for those long days of work around the block, the puma Photon sandals is stylish and comfortable at the same time. With padded straps and a cushioned footbed, there's nothing better that you can offer your feet for that well breathable feel.Upper Velvetty synthetic leather velcro straps in the forefoot and midfoot for a snug Fit Backfoot strap for support and to lock the foot in place Perforations on the sides of straps for enhanced breathability Cushioned straps for comfort Stitch detailing on straps with puma cat logo for style Midsole PU footbed for durable, all-day cushioned comfort Footbed textured with hexagonal patterns for a massage feel Curved footbed for ergonomic comfort to the inner arch Outsole TPR outsole with V-shaped lugs on the periphery of the forefoot and mid-length of the foot for absolute grip and traction shoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustUse a brush to remove dust from the velvetty strapsDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
